values.overLimit: You are over this plan's limit. Existing items remain available.

empty.description: Add the first item to get started.
empty.title: Nothing here yet

callName.goal: Your dog responds when hearing their name
steps: Call your dog's name
When your dog looks at you
Praise and reward
callName.title: Name response
tricks: Keep your voice cheerful and friendly

comeHere.goal: Your dog runs to you when called
steps: Sit down and call their name
Say "Come here"
Reward when your dog comes close
comeHere.title: Come here
tricks: Always use a happy voice to encourage them

fetch.goal: Your dog picks up an item and brings it back
steps: Give your dog a toy to hold
Say "Bring it back"
Reward when your dog brings it to you
fetch.title: Fetch

jumpThroughHoop.goal: Your dog jumps through a hoop on cue
steps: Hold the hoop close to the ground
Encourage your dog to step through
Raise the hoop gradually
Reward each successful try
jumpThroughHoop.title: Jump through a hoop

lieDown.goal: Your dog lies down on cue
steps: Ask your dog to sit
Lower the treat toward the floor
Say "Down"
Reward when your dog lies down
lieDown.title: Lie down
tricks: Practice when your dog is a little tired

rollOver.goal: Your dog rolls over on the floor
steps: Ask your dog to lie down
Guide a treat around your dog's shoulder
Say "Roll"
Reward when your dog rolls over
rollOver.title: Roll over
tricks: Move slowly and clearly, breaking the motion into steps

shake.goal: Your dog offers a paw on cue
steps: Sit facing your dog
Offer your hand and say "Shake"
Reward when your dog places a paw on your hand
shake.title: Shake
tricks: You can gently hold the paw at first to guide them

steps: Hold a treat in your hand
Move your hand above your dog's head
Say "Sit"
Reward when your dog sits
sit.title: Sit
tricks: Do not push your dog's hips down; let them sit naturally

stay.goal: Your dog holds position when asked
steps: Give the "Stay" cue
Step back a little
Return and reward if your dog does not move
stay.title: Stay
tricks: Start with short durations and increase gradually
